testcase.name: testSearchByID
testcase.system-out: Search by ID result: ID: 6830260631 | Hash: 68:2:WHERETIME | Recipient: +27838884567 | Message: Where are you? You are late! I have asked you to be on time.

testcase.name: testSentMessagesPopulated
testcase.system-out:
Sent messages: [Did you get the cake?, It is dinner time!] ----Message----1---- ID: 3897606215 | Hash: 38:1:DIDCAKE | Recipient: +27834557896 | Message: Did you get the cake?
----Message----2---- ID: 5640777044 | Hash: 56:4:ITTIME | Recipient: 0838884567 | Message: It is dinner time!

testcase.name: testGetLongestMessage
testcase.system-out: Longest: ID: 5352352986 | Hash: 53:2:WHERETIME | Recipient: +27838884567 | Message: Where are you? You are late! I have asked you to be on time.

testcase.name: testDisplayReport
testcase.system-out: ===== STORED MESSAGE REPORT ===== ID: 8403373556 Hash: 84:2:WHERETIME Recipient: +27838884567 Message: Where are you? You are late! I have asked you to be on time. ----- ID: 3644727964 Hash: 36:5:OK,YOU Recipient: +27838884567 Message: Ok, I am leaving without you. -----

testcase.name: testStoredMessagesPopulated
testcase.system-out:
Stored messages report:
===== STORED MESSAGE REPORT ===== ID: 4989792676 Hash: 49:2:WHERETIME Recipient: +27838884567 Message: Where are you? You are late! I have asked you to be on time. ----- ID: 6250202764 Hash: 62:5:OK,YOU Recipient: +27838884567 Message: Ok, I am leaving without you. -----

testcase.name: testSearchByRecipient
testcase.system-out: Recipient search: ID: 9231634198 | Hash: 92:5:OK,YOU | Recipient: +27838884567 | Message: Ok, I am leaving without you.
